name: Wisp_Mulch_Die
title: Pocketed Spark
effect:
Gain Mulch;
Store 1 die from your discard on it.

name: Wisp_Swap_Die
title: Pollen Theft
effect:
Swap one of your dice
with an opponent’s 
same-size die
(no re-rolls)

name: Wisp_Upgrade_Die
title: Overgrowth
effect:
Upgrade a die 
two steps — 
skip missing sizes; 
use gained die now
